title: clausena punctata
intro: Clausena punctata, also known as the Java plum or Japanese pepper, is a plant species in the family Rutaceae, native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and aiding in the prevention of certain diseases due to its high content of flavonoids and limonoids. Clausena punctata can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used in traditional medicine practices.
